name: REGENEREX PHARMA, INC.
business: Regenerex Pharma, Inc. develops and commercializes advanced wound care healing products, including Xcellderma OTC Liquid Bandage and Accelerex Sterile Wound Cream containing the proprietary QBx technology. The company's Wound Closure System treats chronic wounds such as diabetic ulcers, pressure ulcers, venous ulcers, burns, and surgical wounds. It targets both domestic and international markets, with a focus on at-risk payment model segments like home health and nursing homes.
sellsTo: U.S. Government-funded home care service providers

exposures.sentence: Regenerex Pharma, Inc. (the 'Company' or 'Regenerex Pharma') specializes in the development and commercialization of advanced wound care healing products.

Perhaps most exciting is our development of a proprietary AI-driven information system that promises to revolutionize our approach to wound management, patient adherence tracking, and personalized medication protocols.

catalysts.event: Raise additional $500,000 by end of July
catalysts.sentence: The Company is currently looking to raise an additional $500,000 by the end of July, to provide adequate cash until contracts start.
The note has been extended and is now due August 17, 2025.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of UAE market development agreement
catalysts.sentence: Expected completion: Fiscal year ending March 31, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Nearly seven million Americans currently live with chronic wounds
tamClaims.sentence: Nearly seven million Americans currently live with chronic wounds

tamClaims.claim: More than 8.3 million Americans suffering from chronic wounds as of 2021
tamClaims.sentence: it is estimated that, as of 2021, there were more than 8.3 million Americans suffering from chronic wounds.
